## Samsung Unveils Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Fold8, Flip8 and New Watch Line With Expanded AI Features

Samsung is compressing the foldable cadence and deploying AI differentiation ahead of Apple's comparable product window; any share-of-premium-segment shift carries downstream implications for AAPL's unit economics and component suppliers in the portfolio.

- Samsung launched the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Fold8, and Flip8 at Galaxy Unpacked, featuring expanded AI capabilities across all three models.
- The Fold8 introduces a 4:3 screen ratio and a slimmer design; Samsung explicitly positions the lineup ahead of Apple in the foldable segment.
- Galaxy Watch Ultra2 and Watch9 were also announced, positioned as health-companion wearables.
- Multi-outlet and Samsung-owned newsroom coverage confirms a coordinated, high-investment product cycle launch.
